title: Brazilian Cheese Pão
description: A rich and savory Brazilian-inspired pão filled with melted cheese and indulgent flavors.

ingredients.name: Cheese
ingredients.notes: a blend of cheddar and parmesan

instructions: Slice the pão in half lengthwise and hollow out the center, leaving a 1/2-inch border.
In a small saucepan, melt the butter over low heat.
Add the garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, for 4-5 minutes or until fragrant.
Stir in the shredded cheese until melted and smooth.
Add the chopped cilantro and red pepper flakes (if using) to the cheese mixture and stir to combine.
Spoon the cheese mixture into the hollowed-out pão, dividing it evenly between the two halves.
Place the pão on a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the bread is toasted.
Remove the pão from the oven and let it cool for 2-3 minutes before serving.
